channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 larksuite/cli (6640 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: larksuite

📝 Repository: larksuite/cli

📄 Descrizione: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills.

⭐ Stelle: 6640

🍴 Forks: 384

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-25T07:13:30Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-05T03:54:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 chenhg5/cc-connect (3425 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: chenhg5

📝 Repository: chenhg5/cc-connect

📄 Descrizione: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

⭐ Stelle: 3425

🍴 Forks: 299

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-28T02:39:39Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-29T04:04:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 taigrr/spank (3400 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: taigrr

📝 Repository: taigrr/spank

📄 Descrizione: Slap your MacBook, it yells back. Uses Apple Silicon accelerometer via IOKit HID.

⭐ Stelle: 3400

🍴 Forks: 148

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: accelerometer apple-silicon fun go iokit macos

]]>

item.title: 🐹 DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli (1537 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DingTalk-Real-AI

📝 Repository: DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli

📄 Descrizione: DingTalk Workspace is an officially open-sourced cross-platform CLI tool from DingTalk. It unifies DingTalk’s full suite of product capabilities into a single package, is designed for both human users and AI agent scenarios.

⭐ Stelle: 1537

🍴 Forks: 67

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-21T03:51:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-05T03:18:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 shankar0123/certctl (283 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shankar0123

📝 Repository: shankar0123/certctl

📄 Descrizione: Self-hosted certificate lifecycle automation platform. Any CA, any server, zero human intervention. Full REST API, web dashboard, and agent-based deployment where private keys never leave your infrastructure. Includes CLI, MCP server for AI assistants, and compliance mapping for SOC 2, PCI-DSS, and NIST.

⭐ Stelle: 283

🍴 Forks: 18

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: certificate-lifecycle-management

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-14T12:22:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-05T03:18:33Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 scrypster/muninndb (241 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: scrypster

📝 Repository: scrypster/muninndb

📄 Descrizione: The cognitive database. A new class of data storage. Not a vector store, not a graph DB, not a RAG wrapper. Ebbinghaus decay, Hebbian learning, and Bayesian confidence are engine-native primitives. Memories evolve on their own. MCP-native. Single binary.

⭐ Stelle: 241

🍴 Forks: 52

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-22T16:32:38Z
